top_signals.title: Prosthetics firm's stock plunges as it denies short-seller's Russia 'propaganda' allegations
top_signals.summary: German prosthetics firm Ottobock fell over 10% on Tuesday in the wake of a report published by US-based hedge fund Grizzly Research.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
